subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness! The Supreme Pen hath willed, from the Most Glorious Horizon, to make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد علیک بهاء الله و عنایته قلم اعلی از افق ابهی اراده نموده ترا ذکر نماید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the power of words; of speech
